title: AnalyzeByClosedEndOption

questionKey.description: Required. The numeric key of the closed-ended question to analyze responses by.

codes.description:
Optional. A list of specific codes from the question's codebook (CoderApiV2.Models.Coder.AnalyzeByClosedEndCodesOption) to focus the analysis on.
If omitted or empty, the AI may consider all codes or infer themes based on the overall responses for the question.

description: Configuration for generating themes based on responses grouped by a closed-ended question.
